episodes.title: Inside Charles Manson’s Secret Funeral (It Devolved Into a Cult Ritual)
episodes.description:
The bloodline of America's most notorious cult leader is finally breaking its silence. Fifty years after the horrific Tate-Labianca murders shocked the world, the face of absolute evil passed away behind bars. But for his grandson, Jason Freeman, the real nightmare was just beginning. This documentary takes you behind the closed doors of one of the most secretive, tense, and chaotic events in modern true crime history: the private funeral of Charles Manson.

When Manson's body was finally released to his family after months of legal battles, his remains were severely degraded. What was supposed to be a quiet, private family viewing quickly devolved into a complete circus as fanatical followers, lifelong loyalists, and strange "groupies" descended on the funeral home to claim a piece of their guru. From fist-clenching fury over the pastor's sermon to followers placing a rebel flag on the casket, the tension in the room was palpable.

episodes.title: Manson's Final Prison Calls Exposed: "My Grandfather was Charles Manson"
episodes.description:
When your grandfather is the most infamous cult leader in American history, his crimes become a shadow you can never outrun. This documentary brings forward the voice of Jason Freeman, a family man and former cage fighter who inherited the bloodline of Charles Manson. For decades, the trauma of the 1969 Tate-LaBianca murders quietly tore the Manson family apart from the inside out, leading Jason's own father, Charles Manson Jr., to a tragic end. Left with endless questions and a fear of his own genetic history, Jason makes the controversial choice to do what no one else dared: answer the prison phone calls from Corcoran State State Prison.
